nodes.name: estimate_flex_deflection
nodes.description: Estimate per-leg flex deflection from hip effort on stance legs.
nodes.type_signature: (hip_positions: np.ndarray, hip_efforts: np.ndarray, stance_mask: np.ndarray) -> np.ndarray
nodes.conceptual_summary: Compliance-model transform that maps hip efforts on stance legs to a per-leg flex deflection vector and zeros out swing legs.
nodes.critic_notes: Signature derived from the Python wrapper definition.
